reviews.comment:
Baños impecables. Falta atención. Cómo sugerencia a sus titulares: pilas con el mini mercado y comidas porque se los come la full que está a 10 km. Una pena siendo estación ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are spotless. The service is lacking. A suggestion for the owners: pay attention to the mini-market and food because the full-service station 10 km away is eating them up. It's a shame, especially considering it's an ACA station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21SNWNFVkhkMlpyTnpGelVrdE1lRGwxU0c1R1pXYxAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad q el servicio de cafetería tremendo. Las cajeras no sabían dar un vuelto...literal....espere más de media hora para que entre tres sacarán la cuenta. Las instalaciones muy buenas

(Translated by Google)
The cafeteria service was truly terrible. The cashiers didn't know how to give change...literally...I waited over half an hour for three of them to finally get the bill. The facilities were very good.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos que haya esperado mas de lo que podía tolerar. Mejoraremos en ese aspecto

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.
Parada obligada para reponer combustible, y tomar un café con algo rico en todo viaje entre CABA y Rosario.

Excellent service. A must-stop for fuel and a delicious coffee or snack on any trip between Buenos Aires and Rosario.
